title: State Bank of India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: State Bank of India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with State Bank of India! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About State Bank of India:
State Bank of India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India!
